name: hig-components-search
description: >- Apple HIG guidance for navigation-related components including search fields, page controls, and path controls. Use this skill when the user says "how should search work in my app," "I need a breadcrumb," "how do I paginate content," or asks about search field, search bar, page control, path control, breadcrumb, navigation component, search UX, search suggestions, search scopes, paginated content navigation, or file path hierarchy display. Cross-references: hig-components-menus, hig-component
author: raintree-technology
summary_zh: 提供苹果人机界面规范中搜索框、分页控件、路径控件等导航组件的设计指引，适合在做应用搜索体验、面包屑或翻页交互时查阅参考。
